name: Golden Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Grease and prepare an 8x8 inch pan.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, cornmeal, salt, sugar, and baking powder.
4. In a separate bowl, mix eggs, butter, and milk until well blended.
5. Pour the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients and beat with a rotary beater until just combined (do not over beat). Stir in the remaining milk.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until golden brown.
